title: Aleš Zamuda
text: Home * People * Aleš Zamuda Aleš Zamuda [1] Aleš Zamuda , a Slovenian computer scientist and assistant professor at Computer Architecture and Languages Laboratory [2] , Institute of Computer Science at University of Maribor , where he received his B.Sc., M.Sc., and Ph.D. degrees in 2006, 2008, and 2012, respectively. His research interests include multi-objective optimization , evolutionary computation and differential evolution , artificial life , and computer animation . He is inventor of Differential Evolution for Parameterized Procedural Woody Plant Models Reconstruction within Environmental Framework to Visualize Emergent Artificial Forest Ecosystems [3] , an approach for reconstruction of procedural three-dimensional models of woody plants (trees). also topic of his Ph.D. thesis [4] . As computer games programmer, Aleš is author of the open source chess engine QuTeChess under the GNU General Public License [5] , and further wrote Reversi and Connect Four programs [6] .
